query:
SELECT 'active_animals' as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM animals WHERE isActive=1 AND deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'total_animals', COUNT(*) FROM animals WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'sales_count', COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'sales_revenue', COALESCE(SUM(salePrice),0) FROM sales WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'expenses_count', COUNT(*) FROM expenses WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'expenses_total', COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) FROM expenses WHERE deletedAt IS NULL;
